item.title: Emerging star Cooper Connolly suffers crushing end to massive knock after body goes into ‘shock’
item.description: The 22-year-old was ‘quite upset’ with himself when he suddenly struggled to move just moments from securing victory.

item.title: Giant-killing world No.76 Kamil Majchrzak ‘too good’ for Alex de Minaur in ATP s’Hertogenbosch final
item.description: Australia’s world No.6 was powerless to stop himself from becoming the new champion’s third top-10 victim in three days.

item.title: Ebola cases surge to nearly 800 as death toll rises in DRC
item.description: Local authorities believe the number of cases may be higher as ongoing conflict has hampered contact tracing efforts.

item.title: Where to lock in a cheap internet plan ahead of July 1
item.description: Here are the top plans you will want to lock in.

item.title: Nathan Lyon defiant in push to play every Test in busy schedule after ‘traumatic’ injury
item.description: ‘I saw George’s comments, he’s had a phone call. I’ve seen Andrew’s comments, he’s had a phone call.’

item.title: UK set to follow Australia’s lead with under 16s social media restrictions
item.description: PM Keir Starmer said it’s time to ‘call time on a system that’s failing our kids’.

item.title: Farmer Alex has tricky conversation with Eddy after being left ‘rattled’ at dinner
item.description: ‘It just wouldn’t work.’

item.title: Justin Gaethje shocks Ilia Topuria in historic White House UFC Freedom 250 bout
item.description: On Donald Trump’s 80th birthday, the US President hosted some of the globe’s most famous people at the fight.

item.title: Gold Coast mental health nurse charged with sexually assaulting and stalking teenage patients denied bail
item.description: Police intercepted the 58-year-old at an international airport as he allegedly tried to board a flight to China with a one-way-ticket.

item.title: Renewed hope for Australia-first proton therapy centre, with Melbourne emerging as potential future home
item.description: For years Australian families have been forced overseas. But that could be about to change.

item.title: Beloved TV mum Anne Schedeen from hit series ALF dies aged 77
item.description: The actress was best known for playing the mother in a hit US 1980s sitcom.

item.title: NSW and WA take different approaches in wake of shark attacks
item.description: A young mother is fighting for life and two families are in mourning following savage maulings.

item.title: Caulfield Cup gets prize money boost in time for 150th running
item.description: The changes put the race in line with the Melbourne Cup, and will help European horses qualify.

item.title: Newsagency addresses ‘$100 million secret’ as massive Powerball prize remains unclaimed
item.description: The winning ticket was purchased more than a year ago.

item.title: Sunrise’s Edwina Bartholomew opens up about the ‘toughest time’ her family faced
item.description: The Sunrise host said one life-changing move helped turn everything around.

item.title: Sarah Tuck’s Japanese beef udon is the cosy dinner everyone will want this winter
item.description: Warm up with this comforting bowl of beef, noodles and flavour-packed broth.

item.title: Hero surf lifesaver Charlie Verco weighs in on shark culling after rescuing Sydney mother Leah Stewart
item.description: The surf lifesaver helped bring Leah Stewart to shore after she was bitten by a great white shark.

item.title: Prince Harry and Meghan Markle respond to UK’s social media ban for under 16s
item.description: ‘The burden cannot rest solely on parents and children.’

item.title: Farmer Wants A Wife contestant Miranda reveals what happened after confrontation with farmer Zac’s sister
item.description: The 21-year-old has said viewers didn’t see what happened immediately afterwards.

item.title: Struggling Pizza Hut chain to be sold by parent company Yum Brands for $A3.8 billion
item.description: The parent company says the pizza chain has struggled with outdated stores and growing competition.

item.title: Jockey Billy Loughnane and Bow Echo tough it out in ‘messy’ St James’s Palace race at Royal Ascot
item.description: ‘The horse definitely got me out of trouble.’

item.title: Russian warship opens fire at British yacht in the English Channel
item.description: Shots were fired at a civilian vessel near Isle of Wight as tensions between London and Moscow intensify.

item.title: Coolmore considers Mission Central for Everest after win in Group 1 King Charles III Stakes
item.description: Trainer Aidan O’Brien and jockey Ryan Moore now have a complete set of Royal Ascot Group 1 wins and Coolmore has The Everest on its mind.

item.title: FBI foils alleged terror plot to attack Donald Trump’s White House UFC event
item.description: The FBI director said in a post on X that ‘multiple individuals are now in custody.’

item.title: Armed group take woman and child from Ebola clinic in DRC as deadly outbreak spreads
item.description: Community distrust in health workers is hampering efforts to contain the spread.

item.title: Kyle Sandilands reaches $12m settlement, ending legal stoush
item.description: A bitter legal battle between the shock jock and his former employer has come to an end after ARN Media agreed to pay up.

item.title: Serena Williams to make grand slam return at Wimbledon alongside sister Venus
item.description: The All England Club have confirmed a wildcard for the 44-year-old.

item.title: Billions to keep flowing in childcare fee battle locking in 15 per cent pay rise for workers
item.description: It's hoped higher wages and a renewed pledge from centres on fees will prove a boost for the sector and a boon for parents.

item.title: MasterChef star Steph De Sousa honours late sister with favourite recipe for MND Awareness Month
item.description: This apple sour cream slice is easy, affordable and packed with flavour.

item.title: British TV legend Jeremy Clarkson announces cancer diagnosis in new episode of Clarkson’s Farm
item.description: ‘If treatment is all successful, I’ll see you next season - and if it isn’t, I won’t.’

item.title: Hundreds of Western Australian residents cop 25 per cent Supagas LPG gas bill increase amid Middle East market impacts
item.description: For many of the affected households in WA, there are no alternative providers to turn to.

item.title: Protestors crash Pauline Hanson’s first National Press Club speech
item.description: A banner dropped down behind the One Nation leader during her speech, as protestors rallied outside.

item.title: Norway's crown princess Mette-Marit has successful lung transplant
item.description: It comes after the 52-year-old was told she likely had only a year to live.

item.title: Spearfishers call on Western Australian government to ramp up shark tagging program in wake of two attacks
item.description: ‘We have the technology and the money to do a far better job.’

item.title: Trump says Iran deal avoided global ‘economic catastrophe’
item.description: ‘I didn’t want to see economic catastrophe. If you kept this going, that could have happened.’

item.title: Lilo and Stitch child star Daveigh Chase dead at 35 following hospitalisation
item.description: The actress was also well known for her award-winning role in The Ring.

item.title: US Judge rips into Gilgo Beach serial killer while handing down life sentence
item.description: ‘You are disgusting — a despicable man, if you are a man at all.’

item.title: Workings of Pauline Hanson banner stunt revealed as investigation launched into National Press Club protest
item.description: An activist group has claimed responsibility for the stunt.

item.title: Parents of children hit and killed by car in Western Sydney make extraordinary call
item.description: The heartbroken parents have spoken out following the horrific crash.

item.title: Tasmania puts Hawthorn star Jack Ginnivan ‘on their whiteboard’ ahead of AFL entry in 2028
item.description: The potential move makes strategic sense on multiple levels.

item.title: Channel 7 sports reporter Xander McGuire wins over internet with fresh AFL takedown
item.description: The Channel 7 sports reporter has moved into rare air, and fans are saying he’s already ‘better than Eddie’.

item.title: Jackie O vows to continue multimillion-dollar legal battle with ARN
item.description: It comes just days after co-host Kyle Sandilands settled for $12.09m.

item.title: DFAT downgrades Middle East travel advice as US President Donald Trump signs Iran Memorandum of Understanding in France
item.description: Foreign Minister Penny Wong issued a warning as she welcomed the deal.

item.title: Western Bulldogs coach Luke Beveridge shoots down Jordan Lewis over English ‘scoop’
item.description: ‘Don’t know who he’s talking to, but we’re not sure there’s any accuracy in any of that.’

item.title: Six-time NBL champion Jesse Wagstaff gunning for Commonwealth Games gold at 40
item.description: ‘Every time you get the chance to pull on the green and gold it means something special.’

item.title: ‘Cruel’ abortion bill torpedoed after dramatic night in South Australia’s parliament
item.description: It was the third unsuccessful attempt in recent years to tighten the law in the state.

item.title: No-confidence vote awaits Victoria Premier Jacinta Allan as Liberals move to oust her before election
item.description: It comes as Allan faces internal pressure over Labor’s tanking poll numbers.

item.title: Sabrina Carpenter gets five-year restraining order against man who kept trying to enter her home
item.description: The chart-topper’s legal team said she is in fear for her own personal safety.

item.title: Ancient oak tree said to have sheltered legendary Robin Hood dies
item.description: The massive 1200-year-old oak has failed to sprout leaves this spring.

item.title: Coogee shark attack victim Leah Stewart an ‘extreme’ infection risk after wounds contaminated with sand, debris
item.description: ‘Please pray for her during her continued surgery and for her body to heal.’

item.title: Aussie jockey Zac Lloyd enjoys maiden Royal Ascot triumph with Moonfall
item.description: The 22-year-old was all smiles after a landmark Royal Ascot winner on his ‘only bullet for the week’.

item.title: Norway’s Crown Princess Mette-Marit undergoes lung transplant days after son sentenced for rape
item.description: The future queen of Norway has been battling chronic lung disease since 2018 and was put on a transplant list 12 days ago.

item.title: First tankers cross Strait of Hormuz sparking tentative relief as US Vice President JD Vance slams Israel for getting in the way of peace
item.description: Trump’s memorandum for peace also called for the ‘permanent termination’ of the war in Lebanon but Vice President JD Vance has since taken aim at behaviour in the Middle East he said was ‘not acceptable’.

item.description: The hilarious reunion was nine years in the making.

item.description: The airline will pocket $93 million in forfeited flights if they’re not rebooked soon.

item.description: The NSW coach is under a burning spotlight while his Queensland counterpart is the toast of the town.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: Anne Hathaway announces she’s pregnant with third child
item.description: The busy star shared the news in an Instagram video.

item.title: 2026 Leapmotor C10 Design Long Range adds more range for no extra money
item.description: A new Long Range version of Leapmotor's flagship C10 Design mid-size electric SUV brings more power and range for the same price.

item.title: Toyota, Nissan warn Japanese buyers about made-in-America quality issues
item.description: Nissan and Toyota are exporting some US-made models to Japan, but are also warning buyers about potential problems.

item.title: One killed and 89 injured as trains collide in Bedford near London
item.description: A major incident has been declared amid the peak-hour horror.

item.title: Why BYD did so well at the 2026 CarExpert Choice Awards
item.description: BYD took home two trophies in this year's CarExpert Choice Awards, with the popular Shark 6 also finishing as a finalist.

item.title: 2026 Nissan Kicks hybrid SUV unveiled, under consideration for Australia
item.description: The second-generation entry-level Kicks SUV has been unveiled in Japan, with Nissan Australia studying the model for a potential local launch.

item.title: Mounted police called in as Socceroos fans flock to Fed Square for World Cup clash with USA
item.description: There was pre-dawn chaos in Melbourne with thousands braving the elements to watch the World Cup action.

item.title: Tensions erupt as Italian PM slams Trump over ‘completely fabricated’ G7 summit claim
item.description: The ‘serious and offensive’ claim has shattered relations between the US and Italy.

item.title: First case of deadly bird flu H5N1 confirmed in Australia as infected seabird dies
item.description: The strain has reached epidemic proportions in animal populations around the world.

item.title: Pauline Hanson wants a monocultural Australia - here’s what that might actually look like
item.description: Could a country built on Indigenous heritage and generations of migration ever become monocultural?

item.title: US shock jock Mike Grella mocks Socceroos with vicious swipe: ‘That’s what they got’
item.description: The American presenter has roasted the Socceroos and cruelly mocked one of their brightest stars.

item.title: Socceroos not happy after World Cup referee Felix Zwayer gives ‘every call to the USA’
item.description: The performance has been called a ‘stinker’ and he’s been reminded ‘there’s two teams on the field’.

item.title: New hope as mouse plague wreaks havoc across Western Australia
item.description: Houses, sheds, paddocks and roads are blanketed with mice.

item.title: Sydney Harbour Tunnel crash causes traffic chaos
item.description: Traffic congestion in northbound lanes has now eased.

item.title: Queensland father beats cancer twice before devastating MND diagnosis
item.description: After a lifetime of fighting, Matt is facing his toughest battle yet.

item.title: Teenager and truckie killed in separate crashes within 30 minutes on Victorian roads
item.description: A fuel truck rolled in one incident and then a p-plater lost control, killing his mate.

item.title: AFL icon Tony Modra ‘stable’ and on the mend after major surgery
item.description: The much-loved AFL icon is miraculously on the mend and the entire country is breathing a sigh of relief.

item.title: King Charles III offers Prince Harry royal estate accommodation during UK visit signalling first reunion with grandkids in years
item.description: The gesture follows years of tension between the royal father and son.

item.title: Socceroos’ World Cup group blown open as winners Paraguay rocked by historic red card for Miguel Almiron
item.description: The pressure has suddenly ramped up on Australia but a star rival has been banned after a controversial act.

item.title: Paul Avery, ‘All My Children’ and ‘Superman’ actor, dies in New Jersey house fire
item.description: ‘We loved them so much, and they loved us so much, and nobody ever had to wonder if that was so.’

item.title: Same‑sex parents to be formally recognised on South Australian birth certificates after Greens bill passes
item.description: New laws allow two mothers to be listed as mothers for the first time, with retrospective effect.

item.title: NRL supercoach Craig Bellamy offers to help NSW coach Laurie Daley win Origin and save his job
item.description: The premiership winner is ‘not going to stick his nose in where it’s not wanted’ but he’s ready to step up for the decider.

item.title: Ebola continues to spread in Democratic Republic of Congo camps as aid agency’s defunded
item.description: ‘People didn’t just die like this before.’

item.title: Major theatre show Beetlejuice The Musical axed amid cost pressures
item.description: ‘It is a difficult decision and not one we made lightly.’

item.title: Adelaide star Josh Rachele bakes brother after 4am wake-up call ahead of win over Melbourne
item.description: The 23-year-old ‘cracked it’ at his sibling’s unexpected visit but he still managed three goals to seal a Crows victory.

item.title: Socceroos debutant Cristian Volpato shares one regret after ‘tearing up’ at World Cup anthem
item.description: The rising star has finally announced himself to Australia - but he admits he should have done so ‘a long time ago’.

item.title: Melbourne man blows triple the blood alcohol limit after allegedly crashing mum’s car into bridge
item.description: The 22-year-old allegedly fled the scene on foot before he was found hiding in a nearby relative’s home.

item.title: AFL hands down verdict on Hawks defender Josh Weddle’s jaw-breaking bump on Daniel Rioli
item.description: His victim was sent to hospital and is set to spend some time on the sidelines.

item.title: 7NEWS The Issue Podcast: Nasty battle brewing as major veteran support changes begin from July 1
item.description: Fury is building over the major overhaul as critics warn the changes could harm those they’re meant to help.

item.title: Supercars champion Brodie Kostecki rushed to the doctor after mid-race health battle in Darwin
item.description: The 28-year-old somehow finished on the podium despite needing to be pulled out of his car for urgent medical attention.

item.title: Body cam shows Los Angeles officer fatally shoot dog during call about screaming woman
item.description: Police later learned the woman was screaming in reaction to the Knicks’ win.

item.title: Riot squad called as protesters target One Nation leader Pauline Hanson at Sydney charity ball
item.description: Hanson says she fears for her life after being targeted with disturbing texts and voicemails.

item.title: Carlton’s finals bid a ‘reality’ as remarkable unbeaten streak continues with win over GWS Giants
item.description: Interim coach Josh Fraser’s midas touch is real and their September hopes are ‘not a hypothetical any more’.

item.title: Australia relaxes psychedelic therapy rules despite safety concerns from clinicians
item.description: Some experts warn the changes could put vulnerable patients at risk.

item.title: Gold Coast sixth-gamer Zane Harrison stuns Panthers with last-gasp field goal
item.description: The 20-year-old announced himself as a star as he set up and sealed one of the bravest comeback wins in his club’s history.

item.title: AI-powered drones could patrol Sydney beaches to prevent shark attacks
item.description: The revolutionary technology could watch the coastline for 12 hours straight.

item.title: ‘Heartbreaking scenes’ as Port Adelaide veteran Esava Ratugolea suffers knee injury in ‘best game of his career’
item.description: The MCG fell silent and a saddened footy world quickly rallied around the distressed defender.

item.title: Australian para sprinter Shannon Winchester shares survival story after defending Jemma Stapleton fundraiser
item.description: The Aussie’s own recovery involved emergency brain surgery, a $60,000 hospital bill and insurance battles.
